description: Calculate resolution times and SLA compliance for 311 pothole requests in /home/ga/Documents/chicago_311_potholes.xlsx. In the 'Pothole_Data' sheet, calculate the 'Days_To_Close' for each entry and determine the 'SLA_Status' using a 7-day limit (categorized as Met, Breached, or Pending for open requests). Create a new sheet named 'Ward_Summary' to report the 'Total_Requests', 'Avg_Days_To_Close', and 'Breached_SLAs' for Wards 1 through 5. Save the updated spreadsheet to /home/ga/Documents/chicago_311_potholes.xlsx.
